diagram_title: Generic Branch Repo MCP CICD — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Local Dev Environment
systems.description: Local operator environment hosting the project repo, beta worktree, MCP server, and project-specific dev runtime.

containers.name: Branch CICD MCP Server
containers.description: Stdio MCP package orchestrating project-aware git worktree and runtime workflow.

containers.name: Git Worktree Layer
containers.description: Canonical repo plus beta worktree managed through explicit git commands.

containers.name: Web Runtime Launcher
containers.description: Project-policy runtime launcher for the main worktree.

components.name: Project Context Resolver
components.description: Resolves repo root, base branch, branch naming policy, beta root, and runtime policy.

components.name: Feature Loop Orchestrator
components.description: Implements prepare/sync/finalize MCP tools with fail-fast gating.

components.name: Worktree Command Adapter
components.description: Runs explicit git branch and worktree commands against main and beta paths.

components.name: Runtime Command Adapter
components.description: Runs the resolved project runtime command in the main worktree.

components.name: Loop Metadata Store
components.description: Persists branch-to-worktree mapping for re-entry and inspection.

components.name: Finalize Guard
components.description: Checks approval flags, dirty state, and merge safety before destructive operations.

relationships.description: launches or refreshes manual verification runtime via project policy
performs guarded merge, branch delete, and worktree remove operations
